items.title: S01E01 - Arthur is Dead
items.summary: In a ploy aimed at bringing together an assortment of Romano-British chieftains, Arthur fakes his own death, with unexpected results.

infolabels.title: Arthur is Dead
infolabels.plot: In a ploy aimed at bringing together an assortment of Romano-British chieftains, Arthur fakes his own death, with unexpected results.

items.title: S01E02 - The Gift of Life
items.summary: Arthur finds two Saxon children, abandoned after an attack on a British village.

infolabels.title: The Gift of Life
infolabels.plot: Arthur finds two Saxon children, abandoned after an attack on a British village.

items.title: S01E03 - The Challenge
items.summary: Arthur's cousins Gawain and Garet cause a lot of trouble for him.

infolabels.title: The Challenge
infolabels.plot: Arthur's cousins Gawain and Garet cause a lot of trouble for him.

items.title: S01E04 - The Penitent Invader
items.summary: Arthur has a plan to use his Christian faith against Pictish invaders.

infolabels.title: The Penitent Invader
infolabels.plot: Arthur has a plan to use his Christian faith against Pictish invaders.

items.title: S01E05 - People of the Plough
items.summary: When Kai, Arthur's lieutenant, falls for a Saxon girl, he thinks carefully about the implications.

infolabels.title: People of the Plough
infolabels.plot: When Kai, Arthur's lieutenant, falls for a Saxon girl, he thinks carefully about the implications.

items.title: S01E06 - The Duel
items.summary: One of Mark's men is killed in a skirmish - Mark believes Llud is to blame for the death and insists on a trial by combat.

infolabels.title: The Duel
infolabels.plot: One of Mark's men is killed in a skirmish - Mark believes Llud is to blame for the death and insists on a trial by combat.

items.title: S01E07 - The Pupil
items.summary: The youthful Corin, in the hope of proving himself as a warrior, launches a foolhardy attack on Arthur.

infolabels.title: The Pupil
infolabels.plot: The youthful Corin, in the hope of proving himself as a warrior, launches a foolhardy attack on Arthur.

items.title: S01E08 - Rolf the Preacher
items.summary: Rolf of the Picts has converted to Christianity, but he remains a threat to Arthur.

infolabels.title: Rolf the Preacher
infolabels.plot: Rolf of the Picts has converted to Christianity, but he remains a threat to Arthur.

items.title: S01E09 - Enemies and Lovers
items.summary: Morcant suspects Arthur and Kai are after the hand of Goda, the daughter of King Athel - and Morcant wants her for himself. So he has Arthur and Kai arrested and claims they have acted as spies for the Saxons.

infolabels.title: Enemies and Lovers
infolabels.plot: Morcant suspects Arthur and Kai are after the hand of Goda, the daughter of King Athel - and Morcant wants her for himself. So he has Arthur and Kai arrested and claims they have acted as spies for the Saxons.

items.title: S01E10 - The Slave
items.summary: Arthur fights to free some enslaved villagers - and one in particular.

infolabels.title: The Slave
infolabels.plot: Arthur fights to free some enslaved villagers - and one in particular.

items.title: S01E11 - The Wood People
items.summary: Saxon fighters kidnap two children and threaten to kill them unless Arthur surrenders himself in the children's place. But Arthur finds an ingenious solution to his dilemma.

infolabels.title: The Wood People
infolabels.plot: Saxon fighters kidnap two children and threaten to kill them unless Arthur surrenders himself in the children's place. But Arthur finds an ingenious solution to his dilemma.

items.title: S01E12 - The Prize
items.summary: Arthur and Mark join forces to mount a raid on a Saxon treasure hoard.

infolabels.title: The Prize
infolabels.plot: Arthur and Mark join forces to mount a raid on a Saxon treasure hoard.

items.title: S02E01 - The Swordsman
items.summary: Mordred tricks Arthur into a fight with Karn, who proves to be a more deadly swordsman than Arthur foresaw.

infolabels.title: The Swordsman
infolabels.plot: Mordred tricks Arthur into a fight with Karn, who proves to be a more deadly swordsman than Arthur foresaw.

items.title: S02E02 - Rowena
items.summary: Arthur and Kai need better horses, and Yorath the Jute has what they want. The two young warriors agree to give payment in kind, by escorting Yorath's daughter Rowena to her wedding with a distant chieftain.

infolabels.title: Rowena
infolabels.plot: Arthur and Kai need better horses, and Yorath the Jute has what they want. The two young warriors agree to give payment in kind, by escorting Yorath's daughter Rowena to her wedding with a distant chieftain.

items.title: S02E03 - The Prisoner
items.summary: Roland, a childhood friend of Kai's, arrives on Arthur's territory, and Kai's loyalty to Arthur and the Britons is seen to be tested - as Roland is another Saxon.

infolabels.title: The Prisoner
infolabels.plot: Roland, a childhood friend of Kai's, arrives on Arthur's territory, and Kai's loyalty to Arthur and the Britons is seen to be tested - as Roland is another Saxon.

items.title: S02E04 - Some Saxon Women
items.summary: Yorath the Jute trades with a travelling merchant, exchanging a barrel of good wine for five Saxon wenches - with unforeseen consequences.

infolabels.title: Some Saxon Women
infolabels.plot: Yorath the Jute trades with a travelling merchant, exchanging a barrel of good wine for five Saxon wenches - with unforeseen consequences.

items.title: S02E05 - Go Warily
items.summary: Arthur has problems with a pair of identical twins of very different characters.Meanwhile, Llud is troubled by dreams of a gigantic enemy warrior.

infolabels.title: Go Warily
infolabels.plot: Arthur has problems with a pair of identical twins of very different characters.Meanwhile, Llud is troubled by dreams of a gigantic enemy warrior.

items.title: S02E06 - The Marriage Feast
items.summary: Arthur is in love with Rowena, but she is promised to his cousin Mark of Cornwall. Arthur must find a way to stop the wedding from going ahead.

infolabels.title: The Marriage Feast
infolabels.plot: Arthur is in love with Rowena, but she is promised to his cousin Mark of Cornwall. Arthur must find a way to stop the wedding from going ahead.

items.title: S02E07 - In Common Cause
items.summary: Arthur considers sharing resources with his Saxon enemies when their livestock suffers from a plague.

infolabels.title: In Common Cause
infolabels.plot: Arthur considers sharing resources with his Saxon enemies when their livestock suffers from a plague.

items.title: S02E08 - Six Measures of Silver
items.summary: Arthur sets out to punish Kurk, a troublesome Saxon thief, when Kurk sells stolen cattle to Rowena of the Jutes.

infolabels.title: Six Measures of Silver
infolabels.plot: Arthur sets out to punish Kurk, a troublesome Saxon thief, when Kurk sells stolen cattle to Rowena of the Jutes.

items.title: S02E09 - Daughter of the King
items.summary: Arthur is having a lot of trouble with the murderous King Bavick. To get some leverage in controlling the King's wicked ways, Arthur kidnaps Bavick's daughter - but his plan does not turn out quite as he intended.

infolabels.title: Daughter of the King
infolabels.plot: Arthur is having a lot of trouble with the murderous King Bavick. To get some leverage in controlling the King's wicked ways, Arthur kidnaps Bavick's daughter - but his plan does not turn out quite as he intended.

items.title: S02E10 - The Games
items.summary: The annual inter-tribal games are a chance for warriors to show what they can do in the field, but as they approach Arthur learns that Herrick and Barth are plotting to disrupt the games for their own ends.

infolabels.title: The Games
infolabels.plot: The annual inter-tribal games are a chance for warriors to show what they can do in the field, but as they approach Arthur learns that Herrick and Barth are plotting to disrupt the games for their own ends.

items.title: S02E11 - The Treaty
items.summary: A treaty with Cerdig appears to be bringing about Arthur's dream of peace among the tribes, but suspicion arises anew when one of Cerdig's men wants to host a friendly gathering.

infolabels.title: The Treaty
infolabels.plot: A treaty with Cerdig appears to be bringing about Arthur's dream of peace among the tribes, but suspicion arises anew when one of Cerdig's men wants to host a friendly gathering.

items.title: S02E12 - The Girl from Rome
items.summary: When a haughty Roman princess seeks refuge from her father in Arthur's camp, he could be in for big trouble with a new enemy.

infolabels.title: The Girl from Rome
infolabels.plot: When a haughty Roman princess seeks refuge from her father in Arthur's camp, he could be in for big trouble with a new enemy.
